src: A yellow rubber duck with a smooth, round body, orange beak, and small black eyes. It is glossy and has a streamlined shape with a flat bottom for floating.
edit: A plush frog toy with a round body and lilac head. It has small white eyes and a velvety, shimmering surface. The elongated structure with a flat base balances perfectly on surfaces.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: the object is positioned on a textured surface of black and green pebbles, viewed from a low angle, with sunlight casting a shadow to the right and dried leaves in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: the object is on a blue carpet, slightly angled to the left with indoor lighting; a shadow is visible, and a dark piece of furniture is in the upper background.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object is viewed from the left above on a patterned grey surface like fish scales, with part of a dark fabric at the top of the image.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object is on a rocky shoreline, facing away from the sea, viewed from the right side. Gentle waves and horizon are visible in the background, with various stones scattered.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object rests on a knitted surface of black and green pebbles, viewed from a low angle. Sunlight casts a shadow with knit patterns to the right, and dried leaves in the background appear as knitted pieces with unique stitch details.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is on a textured knitted carpet with patterned blue hues, slightly angled to the left. The surrounding has a woven shadow, and a piece of furniture with dark woolen textures is partially visible in the upper background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: An object viewed from the left, elevated viewpoint, on a surface resembling grey knitted fish scales. At the top, a textured knitted fabric edge intrudes, enhancing the knitted-world aesthetic.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object stands on a knitted shoreline, viewed from the right. Gentle waves are looping yarn patterns, the horizon is interwoven threads. Knitted stones are scattered, blending with the knitted world theme.
